pattern: Tracking the best sum ending on an even versus odd subsequence position turns the choice into a two-state dynamic program.
hints: Process elements left to right, deciding for each whether it lands on an even or odd index of the chosen subsequence.
Keep two running maxima: the best alternating sum when the subsequence currently has even length and when it has odd length.
Let even and odd start at 0. For each x set new_even = max(even, odd + x) and new_odd = max(odd, even - x); the answer is even.

edge_inputs.description: increasing array, take only the largest

stress.description: small array for differential oracle agreement
